bead.title: server: add stale-safe document write and federation forwarding
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The web UI needs safe spec editing for any registered project. Local document writes currently overwrite immediately, and hub-mode has no owner-targeted documentWrite forwarding.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_mutation_docs.go:34 defines DocumentWrite with only path and content.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_mutation_docs.go:55 writes content directly with os.WriteFile and no expected hash/version check.
- cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql:3263 exposes documentWrite(path, content) without an expected version/hash input.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-021-dashboard-ui.md:356 requires spec/document edits to be project-scoped, path-confined, and owner-targeted in hub-mode.
- docs/helix/03-test/test-plans/TP-002-server-web-ui.md:353 defines TC-019 for cross-project spec editing, stale-write refusal, and federated document write.

PROPOSED FIX
- Extend documentWrite with an expected hash/version input and conflict response semantics.
- Preserve ResolveDocumentPath confinement for local writes.
- Reject stale writes before os.WriteFile when expected hash/version does not match current content.
- Route hub-to-spoke documentWrite through owner-targeted forwarding with origin/forwarding metadata.
- Refresh or expose document graph/staleness refresh behavior after successful writes.

NON-SCOPE
Do not build a full collaborative editor or arbitrary filesystem browser. Keep the primary workflow scoped to project documents, especially docs/helix/**.
bead.acceptance:
1. Go test `TestDocumentWrite_RejectsStaleExpectedHash` proves stale saves fail without overwriting current content.
2. Go test `TestDocumentWrite_PathConfinementStillRejectsEscape` proves absolute paths and `../` traversal remain rejected.
3. Go test `TestFederatedDocumentWrite_ForwardsToOwner` proves hub saves for spoke projects persist on the spoke and not locally.
4. Go test `TestDocumentWrite_RebuildsGraphAfterSave` proves successful spec saves refresh returned document/graph state or expose a deterministic refresh path.
5. Playwright `spec-editing.spec.ts` includes save FEAT doc, path confinement, stale-write refusal, federated document write, and graph/staleness refresh scenarios.
6. `cd cli && go test -short ./internal/server/graphql/... ./internal/docgraph/... ./internal/federation/...` passes.
7. `cd cli/internal/server/frontend && bunx playwright test e2e/spec-editing.spec.ts` passes once UI wiring lands.
8. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
